name: Credential Access via LaZagne
description: Credential access via the popular open-source LaZagne tool is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Credential Access via LaZagne'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WindowsSysmon event_id=10 call_trace="*C:\Windows\SYSTEM32\ntdll.dll+*|C:\Windows\System32\KERNELBASE.dll+*_ctypes.pyd+*python27.dll+*"`.
